# Ostwald Viscometer

**Summary**: A capillary viscometer used to measure the viscosity of a liquid.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018]] used an Ostwald viscometer to determine the viscosity of glycerin-based solutions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Measured viscosities ranging from 1 cP (base) up to 3.10 cP for high glycerin concentrations. ([[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018, p. 42]])
